Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Look for active scorpions with intact limbs and no visible injuries. Captive-bred is preferred as wild-caught specimens are CITES-regulated. Juveniles (2-3 inches) adapt better to captivity than adults. Avoid scorpions with white spots (mites) or those kept in dry conditions.
